Arbitration & ADR

Overview

Helping commercial and private parties resolve disputes efficiently outside courtrooms. We advise on arbitration clauses, represent clients in domestic arbitrations, and handle court petitions for arbitrator appointments.

Key Areas of Focus

  • ✓ Representing clients in Arbitration tribunals
  • ✓ Appointment of Arbitrators under Section 11
  • ✓ Challenging Arbitration Awards under Section 34
  • ✓ Enforcement of Arbitral Awards

Primary Legislation & Statutes

Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, under Section 34 of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, an award can be challenged on limited grounds such as lack of proper notice, incapacity of parties, dispute not falling within terms of arbitration, or conflict with public policy of India.

Need Legal Assistance?

Schedule a confidential consultation with our legal experts today.
